mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '정상' THEN 1 END), 0) as used_count, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '미사용' THEN 1 END), 0) as unused_count, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '비효율' THEN 1 END), 0) as inefficient_count FROM hot_index_agg_1m hi INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId}

SELECT hi.index_name, hi.total_idx_scan as idx_scan FROM hot_index_agg_1m hi INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId} ORDER BY hi.total_idx_scan DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT hi.index_name, (100 - hi.avg_idx_efficiency) as inefficiency_score FROM hot_index_agg_1m hi INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId} AND hi.status = '비효율' ORDER BY inefficiency_score DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT hi.index_name, hi.total_idx_scan as idx_scan, hi.avg_idx_efficiency as efficiency FROM hot_index_agg_1m hi INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId}

SELECT COALESCE(AVG(hi.avg_idx_hit_ratio), 0) as cache_hit_ratio, COALESCE(AVG(hi.avg_scan_time_ms), 0) as avg_scan_speed, COALESCE(SUM(hi.total_idx_tup_read), 0) as total_reads, COALESCE(SUM(hi.total_idx_tup_fetch), 0) as total_writes, COALESCE(COUNT(CASE WHEN hi.status = '비효율' THEN 1 END), 0) as inefficient_count FROM hot_index_agg_1m hi INNER JOIN monitor_database d ON hi.database_id = d.database_id WHERE d.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND hi.database_id = #{databaseId}
SELECT database_id, instance_id, database_name, is_enabled, created_at, updated_at FROM monitor_database WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY instance_id, database_id

SELECT hot_index_raw_id, database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, index_name, index_size, idx_scan, idx_tup_read, idx_tup_fetch, idx_blks_read, idx_blks_hit, last_idx_scan, created_at, index_type, bloat_percent, avg_scan_time_ms FROM hot_index_raw WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND schema_name = #{schemaName} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND index_name = #{indexName} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hot_index_raw ( database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, index_name, index_size, idx_scan, idx_tup_read, idx_tup_fetch, idx_blks_read, idx_blks_hit, index_type, bloat_percent, avg_scan_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.schemaName}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.indexName}, #{item.indexSize}, #{item.idxScan}, #{item.idxTupRead}, #{item.idxTupFetch}, #{item.idxBlksRead}, #{item.idxBlksHit}, #{item.indexType}, #{item.bloatPercent}, #{item.avgScanTimeMs}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO hot_index_agg_1m ( database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, index_name, avg_index_size, total_idx_scan, total_idx_tup_read, total_idx_tup_fetch, total_idx_blks_read, total_idx_blks_hit, avg_idx_efficiency, avg_idx_hit_ratio, idx_scan_per_day, status, index_type, avg_bloat_percent, avg_scan_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES
( #{item.databaseId}, #{item.collectedAt}, #{item.schemaName}, #{item.tableName}, #{item.indexName}, #{item.avgIndexSize}, #{item.totalIdxScan}, #{item.totalIdxTupRead}, #{item.totalIdxTupFetch}, #{item.totalIdxBlksRead}, #{item.totalIdxBlksHit}, #{item.avgIdxEfficiency}, #{item.avgIdxHitRatio}, #{item.idxScanPerDay}, #{item.status}, #{item.indexType}, #{item.avgBloatPercent}, #{item.avgScanTimeMs}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT hot_index_agg_id, database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, index_name, avg_index_size, total_idx_scan, total_idx_tup_read, total_idx_tup_fetch, total_idx_blks_read, total_idx_blks_hit, avg_idx_efficiency, avg_idx_hit_ratio, idx_scan_per_day, status, index_type, avg_bloat_percent, avg_scan_time_ms, created_at FROM hot_index_agg_1m WHERE database_id = #{databaseId} AND schema_name = #{schemaName} AND table_name = #{tableName} AND index_name = #{indexName} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at < #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hot_index_agg_5m ( database_id, collected_at, schema_name, table_name, index_name, avg_index_size, total_idx_scan, total_idx_tup_read, total_idx_tup_fetch, total_idx_blks_read, total_idx_blks_hit, avg_idx_efficiency, avg_idx_hit_ratio, idx_scan_per_day, status, index_type, avg_bloat_percent, avg_scan_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{databaseId}, #{collectedAt}, #{schemaName}, #{tableName}, #{indexName}, #{avgIndexSize}, #{totalIdxScan}, #{totalIdxTupRead}, #{totalIdxTupFetch}, #{totalIdxBlksRead}, #{totalIdxBlksHit}, #{avgIdxEfficiency}, #{avgIdxHitRatio}, #{idxScanPerDay}, #{status}, #{indexType}, #{avgBloatPercent}, #{avgScanTimeMs}, NOW() )
